create_chocolate_fountain.ponder.chocola: Chocolate Fountains can be supplied with chocolate from below
A redstone signal will disable the fountain
Chocolate Fountains also work with Honey
Bees will not become angry around the Chocolate Fountain
Already angry bees will be calmed when entering the fountain's range
Chocolate Fountains have a range of 10 blocks by default
Players within this range are automatically fed with chocolate
